name: Silver to Gold Loader
description: Loads validated Parquet files from GCS Silver bucket into BigQuery staging and curated datasets with automatic clustering and day partitioning.

parameters.name: silver_gcs_path
parameters.label: Silver GCS Path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the validated Parquet file (e.g. gs://bucket/dataset/year=2026/month=04/day=03/uuid/file.parquet).

parameters.name: target_bq_table
parameters.label: Target BigQuery Table
parameters.helpText: Name for the BigQuery table in staging and curated datasets.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.label: Job ID
parameters.helpText: Pipeline job ID for Firestore status tracking.

parameters.name: firestore_database
parameters.label: Firestore Database
parameters.helpText: Firestore database ID for job tracking.

parameters.name: pipeline_failed_topic
parameters.label: Pipeline Failed Topic
parameters.helpText: Pub/Sub topic name for failure notifications.
